metadata.title:
FREIGHT Rates ARE


GIVEN BIG ADVANCE

pages.raw_text:
Nearly every pound Of freight
shipped by jobbers from eastern and
middle eastern points to the Pacific
coast is affected by the advance in
commodity rates put into effect today
by the western railroads and their
eastern connections. The lines MAX
ing the advance are the Southern Pa
ciflc. Union Pacific, Great Northern,
Burlington, Northern Pacific and Ca
madam Pacific. The increase aver
ages 171a per cent.


Merchants and shippers are un-
derstood to be much aggrieved be-
cause they do not consider that they
were granted sufficient opportunity to
adjust their business to the changes
